evaluations.customer_message: I never received my order. It's been 8 days and the tracking hasn't updated.
evaluations.agent_reply: Thank you for bringing this to my attention, and I sincerely apologize for the inconvenience this delay has caused. I've located your order and confirmed the carrier mis-scanned the package — I've initiated a replacement shipment which will arrive within 2-3 business days via expedited delivery. I've also applied a 15% credit to your account for the inconvenience. Please don't hesitate to reach out if you have any further concerns.

accuracy.reason: Resolution details clear; timeline and credit info accurate

brand_voice.reason: Stiff corporate tone; missing casual energy, emojis, tone keywords

completeness.reason: Acknowledges, resolves, and adds goodwill credit in one reply

scores.summary: Resolves well but tone is too formal and corporate for Orbit Streetwear brand.
